metadata.description: Pair-program with one Claude across multiple laptops. Host opens a room, teammates join from their own terminals via the collab-claw CLI, and prompts/responses are mirrored to everyone in real time.

plugins.name: collab-claw
plugins.description: Host-side plugin. Run `/collab-claw:host` in a Claude Code session to open a room. Joiners use the standalone `collab-claw` CLI (npm install -g collab-claw or git clone) — they don't need this plugin.
